home.title: Strada — Run your company from your pocket
home.description: Unify quotes, orders and financial reporting on one platform with native DIA ERP integration. Enterprise-grade security, real-time data, flawless reports.

solutions.description: DIA ERP connectivity, automated data synchronization, P&L, income-expense and collections reports. Explore the Strada modules.

features.title: An enterprise control center that turns data into value
features.subtitle: A modular, scalable financial operating system that distills scattered ERP data into one clear picture.

sync.title: Automated Data Synchronization
sync.description: Cash, bank, account and inventory movements flow from DIA ERP into Strada in real time. No manual exports, copy-paste or lag.

reports.title: Financial Reporting Modules
reports.description: P&L, Income, Expense, Collections and Financial Position reports in one click — boardroom-ready, presentable visuals.

erp.title: DIA ERP Connectivity
erp.description: Built on top of your existing ERP investment. Goes live in minutes without disrupting your processes.

mobile.title: Mobile Management
mobile.description: Access quotes, requests, orders and reports from your pocket. Field teams and management always meet on the same data.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption, role-based access and KVKK-compliant infrastructure. Your data stays under your control.

showcase.title: Your real data, real reports

modules.title: A report for every process in your business
modules.subtitle: From finance to production, sales to collections — Strada modules give you every view you need.

items.name: Profit / Loss
items.desc: Compare the balance of income and expense.

items.name: Sales Report
items.desc: Analyze sales by customer and inventory.

items.quote: Before Strada, collecting reports took days. Now the data in DIA lands on our management screen instantly. Our decision speed has completely changed.
items.author: Mehmet Y.

items.quote: In a ready-mix concrete operation, seeing sales per customer and product in one table is priceless. Collections tracking alone paid for the investment.
items.author: Ayşe K.

items.quote: The mobile side changed our team's game. A manager in the field approves a quote and finance sees it at the same moment. We reached enterprise discipline with a small team.
items.author: Burak D.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to turn your data into insight?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Let's schedule a live demo tailored to your company. In 20 minutes we'll show how Strada turns your ERP data into reports.

footer.tagline: The enterprise reporting platform that turns your ERP data into real-time financial insight.
footer.newsletterDesc: Be the first to know about new modules and features.

hero.title: The financial operating layer built on top of your ERP
hero.subtitle: Strada unifies integration, automated synchronization, financial reporting and ERP connectivity into one consistent platform.

integrations.title: Connects to your existing systems
integrations.description: Strada establishes a secure API connection with your financial systems, led by DIA ERP. No need to redesign your processes.
points: Two-way, real-time connection with DIA ERP
Cash, bank, account, inventory and order data
Secure API keys and role-based access

sync.title: Automated data synchronization
sync.description: Data is fed from a single source of truth. Strada syncs continuously in the background; you only ever see up-to-date, consistent results.

reporting.title: Financial reporting modules
reporting.description: Every metric management wants to see, in presentation-ready visuals. From P&L to collections, every table in one click.
points: P&L, Income, Expense, Collections, Financial Position
Sales analysis by customer and inventory

erp.title: Trusted at enterprise scale
erp.description: Strada doesn't replace your enterprise ERP investment — it amplifies it, adding a modern reporting experience on top of your existing workflows.
points: Go live in minutes without disrupting processes

hero.title: Making financial clarity accessible to everyone
hero.subtitle: Strada is a Turkish technology company that turns the scattered ERP data of manufacturing and construction firms into reliable, instant and actionable insight.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: We believe every company, at any scale, deserves enterprise-grade financial visibility. We reduce complex ERP data to the clarity a manager can grasp at a glance.

values.title: Clarity
values.desc: The more complex the data, the simpler its presentation must be.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Financial data is sacred. Security is not a feature — it's the foundation.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: Decision speed is competitive advantage. We work in real time.

security.title: Enterprise security infrastructure standards
security.subtitle: Your data is protected at every layer of the architecture.

items.title: End-to-end encryption
items.desc: TLS in transit and AES-256 at rest.

items.title: Role-based access
items.desc: Each user sees only the data they're authorized for.

items.title: KVKK compliance
items.desc: Personal data is processed per KVKK principles.

items.title: Audit trail
items.desc: Every access and change is logged.

items.title: Redundancy
items.desc: Regular backups and a disaster recovery plan.

items.title: Isolated architecture
items.desc: Data layers are separated in a multi-company structure.

grid.title: Modules tailored to your business
grid.subtitle: From inventory management to financial reporting — every solution works in real time with your DIA ERP data.

meta.title: Inventory Management — Warehouse and stock tracking
meta.description: DIA ERP-integrated inventory management: track warehouse movements, stock levels and sales in real time. Manage your warehouse processes from a single Strada screen.

stok-yonetimi.title: Inventory Management
stok-yonetimi.tagline: Track your warehouse and inventory processes
stok-yonetimi.overview: Strada Inventory Management visualises your warehouse and inventory data from DIA ERP in real time. See which product is in which warehouse, how much stock is on hand and sales velocity at a glance. No more manual report preparation.
benefits: Track stock levels across all warehouses in real time
Analyse stock sales trends and turnover rate
Speed up procurement planning with critical stock alerts
Automatic sync with DIA ERP — no manual data entry
features: Warehouse-level stock view with multi-warehouse support
Stock sales report for product performance analysis
Inventory movement history and period comparison
Mobile access for on-the-go stock checks
Exportable tables and presentation-ready visuals
useCases: Multi-warehouse stock tracking for manufacturing and construction firms
Ready-mix concrete and building materials procurement planning
Sales teams accessing up-to-date stock information in the field

meta.title: Stock Converter — Automatic stock code matching
meta.description: Automatically match stock codes across different systems. End manual mapping between supplier, customer and ERP stock codes with Strada Stock Converter.

stok-donusturucu.title: Stock Converter
stok-donusturucu.overview: Different suppliers, customers or legacy systems use different stock codes. Strada Stock Converter automatically maps these codes to your DIA ERP stock cards. It eliminates data transfer errors and accelerates processes.
benefits: Automatically match supplier and customer codes to ERP codes
Eliminate manual code conversion work
Automate repetitive tasks with bulk mapping rules
Prevent incorrect stock entries and mismatches
features: Flexible mapping rules and bulk import
Barcode, SKU and custom code format support
Suggestion and approval flow for unmatched codes
Two-way sync with DIA ERP stock cards
Mapping history and audit trail
useCases: Standardising product codes from multiple suppliers
Code mapping when migrating from legacy ERP to DIA
Automatic conversion of codes on customer order forms

meta.title: Invoice Converter — Import Excel invoices to ERP
meta.description: Import Excel invoices to DIA ERP in one click. End manual invoice entry and reduce error rates with Strada Invoice Converter.

fatura-donusturucu.title: Invoice Converter
fatura-donusturucu.tagline: Import Excel invoices to ERP in one click
fatura-donusturucu.overview: Manually entering supplier Excel invoices into ERP is a waste of time. Strada Invoice Converter reads standard Excel templates, validates rows and automatically imports them into DIA ERP. Processes that took minutes now take seconds.
benefits: Import Excel invoices to DIA ERP in one click
Prevent incorrect entries with row-level validation
Reduce the accounting team's workload with bulk processing
Automatically match invoices to stock and account cards
features: Flexible Excel template support and column mapping
Pre-import preview and error report
Automatic account and stock card matching
Bulk import and transaction history
VAT and amount validation checks
useCases: Bulk import of hundreds of monthly supplier invoices
Fast processing of subcontractor invoices on construction projects
Freeing the accounting team from manual data entry

meta.title: Expense Report — Group and analyse expense items
meta.description: Group all expense items by category, period and project. Turn your DIA ERP expense data into instant financial insight with Strada Expense Report.

gider-raporu.title: Expense Report
gider-raporu.overview: Don't let your expenses get lost in scattered spreadsheets. Strada Expense Report groups all expense movements from DIA ERP by category, period, project and department. Strengthen budget control with trend analysis and comparative views.
benefits: Automatically categorise expense items
Visualise monthly and annual expense trends
Detect budget variances early
Create board-ready expense reports
features: Expense grouping by category, project and department
Period comparison and trend charts
Integrated view with income-expense balance
Filterable tables and detail drill-down
PDF and Excel export
useCases: Monthly expense analysis for finance directors
Project-based cost tracking and budget control
Ready expense summaries for board presentations

meta.title: Income Report — Track company revenue in real time
meta.description: Track your company revenue in real time. Strada Income Report turns your DIA ERP sales and collection data into an instant revenue flow view.

gelir-raporu.title: Income Report
gelir-raporu.tagline: Track your company revenue in real time
gelir-raporu.overview: Seeing your revenue flow instantly is the foundation of sound decisions. Strada Income Report consolidates sales invoices, collections and income movements from DIA ERP on one screen. Spot growth opportunities with period comparison and trend analysis.
benefits: See all revenue sources on one screen
Analyse monthly and annual revenue trends
Track the split between collected and invoiced revenue
Make instant decisions with real-time data
features: Breakdown by revenue source and customer
12-month revenue trend and comparative charts
Income view integrated with collection status
Period, project and region filters
Presentation-ready visuals and export
useCases: Monthly revenue performance tracking for general managers
Sales team target achievement analysis
Revenue summaries for investor and stakeholder presentations

meta.title: Sales Report — Regional, staff and product sales analysis
meta.description: Analyse sales by region, staff and product. Visualise your DIA ERP sales data with detailed breakdowns using Strada Sales Report.

satis-raporu.title: Sales Report
satis-raporu.overview: See your sales performance from every angle. Strada Sales Report offers detailed breakdowns by region, sales rep, customer and product. Analyse which product sells where and which rep stands out — in one click.
benefits: Compare regional and sales rep performance
See product and stock-based sales distribution
Develop targeted strategy with customer segmentation
Analyse seasonality with 12-month sales trends
features: Breakdowns by region, staff, customer and product
Stock sales and customer distribution charts
Period comparison and growth rate calculation
Filterable tables and sorting
Mobile access for field sales tracking
useCases: Sales managers evaluating team performance
Product portfolio optimisation and stock planning
Developing regional growth strategy

meta.title: Order Report — Open and pending order tracking
meta.description: Track open and pending orders in real time. Monitor your DIA ERP order data by status, customer and delivery with Strada Order Report.

siparis-raporu.title: Order Report
siparis-raporu.overview: Pending orders are the pulse of your operations. Strada Order Report lists open orders from DIA ERP by status, customer, delivery date and product. Spot delay risks early and improve customer satisfaction.
benefits: See open and pending orders on one screen
Detect delivery delay risks early
Customer-based order history and status tracking
Support production and logistics planning with order data
features: Order status filtering: open, partial, completed
Customer and product-based order list
Delivery date and delay alerts
Stock sufficiency check via order-stock integration
Mobile notifications for instant order updates
useCases: Operations managers' daily order tracking
Customer relations team delivery status queries
Order prioritisation in production planning

meta.title: Profit/Loss Report — Net profitability analysis
meta.description: Measure your company's net profitability. Strada P&L Report combines DIA ERP income and expense data for instant profit margin and financial performance views.

kar-zarar-raporu.title: Profit/Loss Report
kar-zarar-raporu.overview: Your business's true performance shows in the profit and loss statement. Strada P&L Report combines all income and expense items from DIA ERP to deliver net profit, profit margin and period comparison instantly. The core metric for management decisions.
benefits: See net profit and profit margin in real time
Compare income-expense balance across periods
Analyse seasonality with monthly profit trends
Create board-ready financial summaries
features: Revenue, expense, net profit and profit margin metrics
Monthly and annual P&L trend charts
Detail drill-down with income-expense breakdown
Budget vs actual comparison
PDF report and presentation mode
useCases: Monthly profitability analysis for finance directors
Financial summary for board meetings
Performance data for investment and growth decisions
